'''Deneelian fizz-pudding''' was a dessert best served cold from the [[Deneeli system/Legends|Deneeli system]]. It was a rare pudding that crackled and popped as one ate it.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Deneelian Fizz Pudding}}</ref>

{{Food-stub}}
